issue: GEPA edited the global incumbent while reflecting on the latest generation's loser.
action: Build reflective evidence from the measured incumbent supplied beside currentSurface.
verification: Provide winner and loser evidence in consecutive generations and assert only winner evidence reaches the author.

issue: One finite judge score allowed a cell containing another unmarked NaN score to pass completeness.
action: Reject any failed or non-finite judge output and keep invalid values out of descriptive aggregates.
verification: Combine one finite judge with one NaN judge and assert proposal never starts.

issue: Durable candidate records dropped parentSurfaceHash, observedDeltaFromParent, eligibility, and coverage.
action: Persist and validate the full measured credit-assignment receipt.
verification: Round-trip a measured PolicyEdit candidate and reject a non-finite observed delta.

issue: A complete candidate was marked promoted when it regressed against the global incumbent.
action: Reserve promoted for the single candidate that actually replaces the incumbent.
verification: Score a child 0.10 against a 0.90 incumbent and assert promoted is empty.

issue: Raw scenario identifiers could leak through author-bound notes and failure reasons after ID transformation.
action: Transform known identifiers in every author-bound history and outcome text field.
verification: Place a private ID in a note and failure reason and assert it is absent from the serialized request.

issue: Two scenarios could map to the same pseudonym and silently merge contradictory task evidence.
action: Require a one-to-one scenario ID transformation within each author request.
verification: Map two distinct IDs to one alias and assert failure before the model call.
